steps.title: Emphasize calendar mismatch
steps.content: The student wants a difference between the French Republican and Gregorian calendars. The relevant notes say their month timelines do not match, and give examples where French Republican months begin during different-numbered Gregorian months.

steps.title: Use the timeline comparison
steps.content: A describes only the French Republican calendar. B describes only Gregorian months. D mentions both calendars but emphasizes replacement history and their shared twelve-month structure. The effective choice states the timeline mismatch and gives an example comparing the two calendars. The answer is C.
